user_query:
I'm reaching out to former players and a few supporters to collect memories and set up a small get-together celebrating our Ohio Valley Conference tournament win back in the '80s. Please help me generate personalized email drafts using the materials in this workspace and save everything under output/.

Requirements:
- Inspect the inputs under input/ to understand the available templates and the team info.
- From the workspace root, run the provided validator script with Python 3: input/validate_contacts.py. This should produce output/clean/contacts_clean.csv and output/logs/validation.log. Use only rows where the "valid" column equals "true" when drafting emails.
- Read input/team_history.md to extract these fields without hardcoding: Tournament Year, Tournament Venue, and Coach Name. Use the Coach Name to derive the coach's last name for {COACH_LAST}.
- Choose a template based on role:
  - role == "player": input/templates/template_player.txt
  - any other role: input/templates/template_supporter.txt
- Replace all placeholders in the chosen template:
  - {FIRST} from first_name in the contacts
  - {YEARS_PLAYED} from years (only appears in the player template)
  - {TOURNAMENT_YEAR} and {VENUE} from team_history.md
  - {COACH_FULL} and {COACH_LAST} from team_history.md
- Deliverables:
  1) One draft per valid contact at output/drafts/{last_name}_{first_name}.txt containing exactly three labeled lines in this order:
     - To: <recipient email>
     - Subject: <subject from the filled template>
     - Body: <the filled message body>
     Ensure no unresolved placeholders remain (no curly braces).
  2) A CSV summary at output/summary/recipients.csv with columns: first_name,last_name,email,role,template_used,subject. Include one row per generated draft.
  3) A JSON report at output/report/summary.json with keys: total_contacts (from the original input/contacts.csv), total_valid (count of valid == true in output/clean/contacts_clean.csv), invalid_skipped, drafts_written, and by_role (an object mapping each role to the number of drafts written). Confirm invalid_skipped equals the 'invalid=' value recorded in output/logs/validation.log.

Notes:
- Inputs are in input/: contacts.csv, templates/, team_history.md, and the validator script.
- Only generate drafts for contacts with valid == true in output/clean/contacts_clean.csv.
- Do not assume any data outside these input files. Extract the year, venue, and coach name from team_history.md.
- Keep all outputs under output/ as specified. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
